# Daily Autodigital Shelf

> Automated public shelf of printable digital packs, worksheets, checklists, seller-copy files, and bundle/import artifacts.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/
- Support page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support.html
- Pay what you can bundle: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/pay-what-you-can.html
- Pricing page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/pricing.html
- Sponsor page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/sponsor.html
- Commercial use page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/commercial-use.html
- Sponsor Kit JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/sponsor-kit.json
- Support card SVG: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/assets/support-card.svg
- Daily Offer page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/daily-offer.html
- Daily Offer JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/daily-offer.json
- Support Signal report: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-signal.html
- Support Signal JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-signal.json
- Checkout Readiness report: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/checkout-readiness.html
- Checkout Readiness JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/checkout-readiness.json
- Revenue Proof report: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/revenue-proof.html
- Revenue Proof JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/revenue-proof.json
- Offers: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/offers/
- Use cases: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/use-cases/
- Templates: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/templates/
- Guides: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/guides/
- Archive: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/archive.html
- Starter bundle: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/starter-bundle.html
- Small Business Ops bundle page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/bundles/small-business-ops-collection.html
- Store import kit: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/store-import.html
- Catalog JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/catalog.json
- Product Feed JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/product-feed.json
- Product Feed XML: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/product-feed.xml
- Product Feed CSV: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/product-feed.csv
- Support Funnel JSON: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-funnel.json
- Support Funnel XML: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-funnel.xml
- Support Funnel CSV: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/support-funnel.csv
- RSS: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/feed.xml
- Atom: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/atom.xml

## Current State

- Latest pack: [Client Intake Lite](https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/packs/2026-06-29-client-intake-lite/) - A small intake sheet for turning a vague request into scope, timeline, budget, and next action. Download page: https://x26dotapp.github.io/daily-autodigital-shelf/downloads/2026-06-29-client-intake-lite.html
- Branded latest product: https://www.calmsprout.com/daily-shelf/products/2026-06-29-client-intake-lite
- Branded product support page: https://www.calmsprout.com/daily-shelf/products/2026-06-29-client-intake-lite/support
- Branded support intent redirect: https://www.calmsprout.com/daily-shelf/products/2026-06-29-client-intake-lite/support/go
- Monetization destination: support at https://gift.calmsprout.com
- Product checkout is not connected unless `store_connected` is true in status.json.
- Checkout Readiness records candidate payment surfaces without marking checkout live.
- Revenue Proof records sanitized local receipt evidence only; it does not prove future revenue or activate checkout.
- Daily Offer is the current buyer-facing support route; it uses DonateAction unless product checkout is connected.
- Support is voluntary and downloads remain public unless a real store checkout is connected.
- Support Signal uses aggregate support-intent clicks only; it does not prove payments or daily revenue.

## Guardrails

- No guaranteed-income claims.
- No live trading.
- No outbound spam.
- No hidden payment credentials.
- No medical, legal, investment, or tax advice.
